raw_request:
A modern version of https://www.redsrrc.com/ â€” a complete modernization, not a clone. Keep the company's name, offerings, and market positioning, but rebuild the structure and layout into a fast, modern, mobile-first Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn/ui site with a fresh, trust-building, professional design and a complementary palette that feels current and premium. Generate brand-new assets (logo refresh, hero imagery, icons, typography) â€” do not reuse the old site's dated imagery.

The primary goal is CONVERSION: turn visitors into qualified leads. Bake a full high-converting lead funnel into the architecture and every page:
- A clear value proposition and hero CTA above the fold on the homepage.
- Multiple low-friction entry points to contact (header CTA, sticky mobile CTA, in-content CTAs, footer).
- A dedicated 'Get a Quote' / 'Contact' landing page optimized for form completion.
- Simple, stylish, easy-to-use contact and lead-capture forms built with shadcn/ui components (Input, Textarea, Select, Checkbox, Button, Form with react-hook-form + zod validation, accessible labels, inline success/error states, progressive disclosure â€” only ask what is needed, no overwhelming long forms).
- A multi-step form option for longer inquiries with a progress indicator and an autosave feel.
- Email + lead capture via Resend, persisting every submission to the database with timestamp, source page, and UTM/campaign attribution.
- Newsletter signup in the footer.
- Trust signals throughout: testimonials, certifications, project gallery/case studies, clear contact info, FAQ.
- Analytics always on â€” instrument the full funnel: pageview -> CTA click -> form start -> form submit -> thank-you, plus traffic sources, users, logins, signups.

Positioning: lead with trust, expertise, and ease of working with us; emphasize responsiveness, quality, and results; avoid jargon and high-pressure sales language. Tone: professional, confident, warm, clear.

Add a blog with 5 starter SEO articles (with generated thumbnails) to build authority and organic traffic, full SEO + GEO (metadata, JSON-LD LocalBusiness, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, llms.txt), and ensure WCAG AA accessibility and Lighthouse > 95.

Requirements (each must get a mission and acceptance criteria):
1. High-converting homepage lead funnel with hero CTA, social proof, services summary, and a final CTA band â€” must have at least 3 conversion entry points.
2. Dedicated conversion-optimized Contact/Get-a-Quote page with a simple, stylish, accessible shadcn/ui form (react-hook-form + zod), inline validation, success state, and Resend delivery â€” acceptance: a visitor can submit in under 60 seconds with only essential fields.
3. Reusable shadcn/ui form component library (ContactForm, LeadForm, NewsletterForm, MultiStepQuoteForm) shared across the site.
4. Lead persistence + admin: every form submission stored in Postgres with source/UTM, viewable in a protected leads dashboard.
5. Sticky mobile CTA + header CTA on every page.
6. Trust-building content blocks: testimonials, certifications, case studies/project gallery, FAQ with schema.
7. Services pages with per-service CTAs feeding the lead funnel.
8. About/Team page building credibility.
9. Blog with 5 generated articles + thumbnails, category/tag pages, and per-article CTAs.
10. Full SEO + GEO + analytics funnel instrumentation.
11. Mobile-first responsive design at every breakpoint, WCAG AA, Lighthouse > 95.
12. Loading, empty, error, and success states on every dynamic surface.

design.summary: Complete modernization into a fast, premium, trust-building, mobile-first professional site. Preserve the company's name, offerings, and market positioning while rebuilding the experience with a current layout system, clear conversion paths, modern UI components, and fresh visual identity assets.
design.color_notes: Use a fresh complementary palette that feels current, premium, professional, and trust-building. Do not reuse the old site's dated color treatment.

topics: industry authority articles based on the company's services

positioning.angle: A trusted, expert, easy-to-work-with company that delivers responsive service, quality work, and reliable results.
positioning.audience: Prospective customers evaluating the company's services and looking for a credible, responsive provider they can contact easily.
emphasize: ease of working with the company
positioning.notes: Primary conversion goal is to turn visitors into qualified leads. Every major page should guide visitors toward low-friction contact or quote requests.

goals: Increase qualified lead generation from website visitors.
Create a complete high-converting lead funnel across the homepage, service pages, blog, and contact page.
Make it possible for a visitor to submit a quote/contact request in under 60 seconds using only essential fields.
Build authority and organic traffic with 5 starter SEO articles.
Achieve WCAG AA accessibility and Lighthouse scores above 95.
Instrument the full funnel from pageview through thank-you confirmation.

requirements.name: Modern rebuild using Next.js, Tailwind, and shadcn/ui
requirements.description: Use Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui as the core frontend stack, with a current component-driven architecture and premium professional UI.
acceptance: Site is implemented with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui components.
Pages load quickly and support mobile-first responsive layouts.
The rebuilt site does not reuse the dated visual presentation of the reference site.

requirements.name: Preserve company identity, offerings, and market positioning
requirements.description: Keep the company's existing name, service offerings, and market positioning while refreshing the presentation, UX, visual identity, and conversion flow.
acceptance: Company name remains unchanged.
Core service offerings from the existing business are represented.
Messaging continues to position the company around trust, expertise, responsiveness, quality, and results.

requirements.name: Fresh regenerated brand assets
requirements.description: Generate brand-new assets including a logo refresh, hero imagery, icons, and typography. Do not reuse old site imagery or dated typography.
acceptance: New logo refresh, hero imagery, icon style, and typography system are provided.
No dated imagery from the old site is reused.
Assets feel consistent with the new premium professional design direction.

requirements.name: High-converting homepage lead funnel
requirements.description: Create a homepage with a clear above-the-fold value proposition, hero CTA, social proof, services summary, trust-building content, and final CTA band.
acceptance: Homepage includes a clear value proposition and primary CTA above the fold.
Homepage contains social proof, services summary, and a final CTA band.
Homepage has at least 3 conversion entry points.

requirements.name: Dedicated Contact / Get a Quote landing page
requirements.description: Build a dedicated Contact/Get-a-Quote page optimized for form completion with a simple, stylish, accessible shadcn/ui form using react-hook-form and zod.
acceptance: A visitor can submit the form in under 60 seconds using only essential fields.
Form includes accessible labels, inline validation, success state, and error state.
Submission is delivered via Resend.

requirements.name: Reusable shadcn/ui form component library
requirements.description: Build reusable shadcn/ui form components including ContactForm, LeadForm, NewsletterForm, and MultiStepQuoteForm.
acceptance: ContactForm, LeadForm, NewsletterForm, and MultiStepQuoteForm components exist.
Components use shadcn/ui form elements and shared validation patterns.
Forms can be reused across homepage, service pages, blog posts, footer, and contact page.

requirements.name: Progressive disclosure forms
requirements.description: Forms should ask only what is needed, avoid overwhelming visitors, and use progressive disclosure for longer inquiries.
acceptance: Short forms request only essential information.
Longer inquiries are handled through progressive disclosure or multi-step flow.
Users are not presented with an overwhelming long form on first interaction.

requirements.name: Multi-step quote form with progress indicator
requirements.description: Provide a multi-step form option for longer inquiries with visible progress and an autosave feel.
acceptance: Multi-step quote form includes a progress indicator.
Users can move through the form in manageable steps.
The experience gives an autosave feel through preserved entered data during the session.

requirements.name: Lead persistence with source and attribution
requirements.description: Persist every form submission to Postgres with timestamp, source page, and UTM/campaign attribution.
acceptance: Every form submission is stored in Postgres.
Stored records include timestamp, source page, and UTM/campaign fields.
Submissions remain available after email delivery.

requirements.name: Protected leads dashboard
requirements.description: Create a protected admin leads dashboard showing form submissions and attribution details.
acceptance: Leads dashboard requires protected access.
Dashboard lists submitted leads with timestamp, form source, and UTM/campaign data.
Dashboard provides enough detail for follow-up and lead qualification.

requirements.name: Resend email delivery
requirements.description: Integrate Resend for lead-capture and contact-form email delivery.
acceptance: Contact and quote submissions trigger Resend email notifications.
Email delivery does not replace database persistence.
Success and failure states are handled in the UI.

requirements.name: Newsletter signup in footer
requirements.description: Add a newsletter signup form in the site footer using reusable shadcn/ui form components.
acceptance: Footer includes a newsletter signup form.
Newsletter form includes accessible labels and validation.
Submission displays clear success or error feedback.

requirements.name: Header CTA on every page
requirements.description: Add a prominent header CTA across all pages that directs visitors into the lead funnel.
acceptance: Every page includes a header CTA.
CTA links to the Contact/Get-a-Quote flow.
CTA is visually clear without feeling high-pressure.

requirements.name: Sticky mobile CTA
requirements.description: Add a sticky mobile CTA across the site for quick quote/contact access.
acceptance: Mobile view includes a sticky CTA.
Sticky CTA appears on every major page.
CTA remains accessible without obstructing important content.

requirements.name: In-content CTAs and footer conversion paths
requirements.description: Place relevant CTAs inside page content and in the footer to guide visitors into the quote/contact funnel.
acceptance: Key content sections include contextual CTAs.
Footer includes contact and/or quote CTA options.
CTA language is clear, warm, and conversion-focused.

requirements.name: Trust-building content blocks
requirements.description: Add testimonials, certifications, case studies/project gallery, clear contact info, and FAQ throughout the site.
acceptance: Site includes testimonials, certifications, case studies or project gallery, clear contact info, and FAQ.
Trust blocks appear on relevant conversion pages.
Trust content supports credibility without excessive jargon.

requirements.name: FAQ with schema
requirements.description: Create FAQ content and implement structured data schema where appropriate.
acceptance: FAQ section exists on relevant pages.
FAQ answers are clear and customer-friendly.
FAQ schema is implemented where applicable.

requirements.name: Services pages with per-service CTAs
requirements.description: Create or modernize services pages with clear service summaries, benefits, trust signals, and CTAs feeding into the lead funnel.
acceptance: Each service page includes a service-specific CTA.
Service content clearly explains offering value and next steps.
CTAs feed into the Contact/Get-a-Quote flow.

requirements.name: About / Team credibility page
requirements.description: Add an About/Team page focused on credibility, experience, values, and ease of working with the company.
acceptance: About/Team page exists.
Page communicates credibility, expertise, and trust.
Page includes a clear CTA into the lead funnel.

requirements.name: Project gallery and case studies
requirements.description: Create a project gallery and/or case-study content blocks that support lead conversion.
acceptance: Project gallery or case-study section exists.
Entries include visuals and concise outcome-oriented descriptions.
Gallery/case-study content includes CTAs where appropriate.

requirements.name: Blog with 5 starter SEO articles
requirements.description: Add a blog with 5 generated starter SEO articles, generated thumbnails, category/tag pages, and per-article CTAs.
acceptance: Blog contains 5 starter SEO articles with generated thumbnails.
Blog includes category and tag pages.
Each article includes a relevant CTA into the lead funnel.

requirements.name: Full SEO implementation
requirements.description: Implement metadata, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, structured data, and SEO-friendly page architecture.
acceptance: Core pages include optimized metadata.
sitemap.xml and robots.txt are generated.
Structured data is included where appropriate.

requirements.name: GEO and AI-search readiness
requirements.description: Implement GEO elements including JSON-LD LocalBusiness, llms.txt, and structured business/service information.
acceptance: JSON-LD LocalBusiness schema is implemented.
llms.txt is provided.
Business/service information is structured clearly for AI and search systems.

requirements.name: Analytics funnel instrumentation
requirements.description: Analytics must always be enabled and instrument pageview, CTA click, form start, form submit, thank-you, traffic sources, users, logins, and signups.
acceptance: Analytics tracks pageview, CTA click, form start, form submit, and thank-you events.
Traffic sources and campaign attribution are captured.
User, login, and signup events are instrumented where applicable.

requirements.name: Thank-you state or page
requirements.description: Provide a clear thank-you experience after successful contact, quote, or lead-form submission.
acceptance: Successful submissions show a thank-you state or page.
Thank-you event is tracked in analytics.
The user receives clear next-step expectations.

requirements.name: Mobile-first responsive design
requirements.description: Design and build every page and component mobile-first with responsive behavior at all breakpoints.
acceptance: All pages are usable on mobile, tablet, and desktop.
Forms and CTAs are optimized for mobile interaction.
Layouts adapt cleanly without overflow or broken spacing.

requirements.name: WCAG AA accessibility
requirements.description: Meet WCAG AA accessibility expectations across navigation, forms, colors, focus states, labels, and dynamic states.
acceptance: Forms include accessible labels and error messages.
Color contrast meets WCAG AA.
Keyboard and focus behavior are handled for interactive components.

requirements.name: Lighthouse performance above 95
requirements.description: Optimize performance, accessibility, SEO, and best practices with Lighthouse targets above 95.
acceptance: Lighthouse scores target above 95.
Images and assets are optimized.
Core pages are fast-loading and stable.

requirements.name: Dynamic surface states
requirements.description: Include loading, empty, error, and success states on every dynamic surface, including forms, dashboards, blog data, and lead views.
acceptance: Dynamic surfaces include loading states.
Empty and error states are designed and user-friendly.
Successful actions show clear success feedback.

requirements.name: Clear contact information
requirements.description: Display clear contact information throughout the site, especially in the header/footer, contact page, and trust sections.
acceptance: Contact information is easy to find.
Contact details appear on the Contact/Get-a-Quote page and footer.
Contact presentation supports trust and conversion.

notes: Analytics must always remain enabled. This is a complete modernization, not a clone. Use the captured site to understand the business, offerings, and overall structure, but refresh the layout, assets, UI, and conversion architecture for a premium modern lead-generation experience.
